_comment: EMA trend-following strategy on Gold - ALL parameters live here
_exit_mode_options: fixed = SL/TP brackets | trailing = trail stop at EMA50 once +1x ATR in profit
_skip_hours_note: low-liquidity hours (NY close -> Asia open), no NEW entries
_news_note: manual v1 list of 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM' UTC events (NFP, CPI, FOMC); no entries within news_window_min of each
_live_warning: false = paper mode (signals logged, NO real orders). Set true ONLY when you want real orders on MT5.
